message.content:
探索 OpenCoreAnalysisKit 的命令执行流程：
1. 找到 REPL 主循环的实现位置
2. 追踪用户输入如何被解析成命令名和参数
3. 追踪 CommandManager 如何根据命令名查找并执行对应的命令对象
4. 找到命令对象的执行入口方法（如 main(), execute() 等）

重点关注命令分发逻辑和参数传递机制。

content.text: 我将探索 OpenCoreAnalysisKit 的命令执行流程，从 REPL 主循环到命令分发和执行。

content.content: /home/cwtrocks/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/parser/core_parser.cpp

callback

    16→
    17→#ifndef PARSER_UI_MINI_SHELL_H_
    18→#define PARSER_UI_MINI_SHELL_H_
    19→
    20→#include <stdint.h>
    21→#include <sys/types.h>
    22→#include <string>
    23→
    24→#define MAX_CMD_LENGTH 512
    25→#define HISTORY_SIZE 50
    26→
    27→#define ARROW_UP     "\x1b[A"
    28→#define ARROW_DOWN   "\x1b[B"
    29→#define ARROW_RIGHT  "\x1b[C"
    30→#define ARROW_LEFT   "\x1b[D"
    31→
    32→#define MOVE_START   "\x1b[H"
    33→#define CLEAR_LINE   "\x1b[K"
    34→
    35→#define KEY_HOME     "\x1b[\x48"
    36→#define KEY_END      "\x1b[\x46"
    37→
    38→#define MOVE_UP      "\x1b[%dA"
    39→#define MOVE_DOWN    "\x1b[%dB"
    40→#define MOVE_RIGHT   "\x1b[%dC"
    41→#define MOVE_LEFT    "\x1b[%dD"
    42→
    43→#define KEYCODE_ESC    0x1B
    44→#define KEYCODE_ENTER  0x0D
    45→#define KEYCODE_BACK   0x08
    46→#define KEYCODE_LF     0x0A
    47→#define KEYCODE_DEL    0x7F
    48→#define KEYCODE_TAB    0x09
    49→
    50→class MiniShell {
    51→public:
    52→    void Init(const char* shell);
    53→    void EnableMode();
    54→    void DisableMode();
    55→    void SaveHistory(char* cmd);
    56→    void ShowHeader();
    57→    void ShowHistory(bool up);
    58→    void ShowCommand();
    59→    void ClearLine();
    60→    void CursorMove(int dx, int dy, bool force=false);
    61→    char* HandleCommand();
    62→private:
    63→    /*
    64→     *  ----- -----
    65→     * |  i  | CMD |
    66→     *  ----- -----
    67→     * |  j  | CMD | --- cursor = j + 1;
    68→     *  ----- -----  |   counter = cursor;
    69→     * | --- | --- |<-
    70→     *  ----- -----
    71→     */
    72→    uint32_t history_counter = 0;
    73→    uint32_t history_cursor = 0;
    74→    char history[HISTORY_SIZE][MAX_CMD_LENGTH];
    75→
    76→    /*     Y
    77→     *     |
    78→     *(0,0)|shell> [cmd] [option] ..
    79→     *     --------|-----------------X
    80→     *            minX
    81→     */
    82→    uint32_t curX = 0;
    83→    uint32_t curY = 0;
    84→    uint32_t minX = 0;
    85→    uint32_t minY = 0;
    86→    uint32_t totalX = 0;
    87→    char command[MAX_CMD_LENGTH] = "";
    88→
    89→    std::string shell;
    90→};
    91→
    92→#endif  // PARSER_UI_MINI_SHELL_H_
    93→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>
